subcodes.first_line: O servant of the one true God! What is meant by "there is neither predestination nor unconditional liberty; neither unwilling compliance nor unreserved authority; it is the Middle Way"
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق لا جبر و لا تفویض لا کره و لا تسلیط امر بین الامرین عبارت از آنست
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
